feedback.text: Many gamers are being brought up to the fact that many video games that we are purchasing have an undetermined expiry date. It is very frustrating devoting money and time into a hobby that may not have a future. Other types of media can be consumed indefinitely, as long as the media itself is usable, but that affirmation regarding video games, not always is true. Please read what the "movement" Stop Killing Games is about, and maybe annex some of this ideas? Thank you for your time.
